titleStmt.title: SII 20.219: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 219. (B.K. No. 65 of 1938-39.) TADALBĀGI, JAMKHANDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone-beam in the Ī1śvara temple, called Dēgula, outside the village.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year 10, Śukla, Śrāvaṇa, Purṇima Wednesday. The weekday is wrong. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1269, July 15, which was Monday and not Wednesday.

The inscription records a gift of land by Bommarāsi, son of Sōvarāsidēva to a mason (name-lost) as remuneration for the construction of the śikhara of the temple of Sōmanātha with brick and mortar. The donor was the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī mahādēvavijayarājyōdayada 10 neya sukula saṁvacharada sravaṇa pu
ṇami budhavaradaṁdu tadalabāgeya śrīsvayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvarācārya sōvarāsidēvara maga boṁmarāsidēvaruṁ sutradhāri ma
vaṁge koṭṭa bhāseya kramaveṁteṁdoḍe © sōmanathadēvara sikharadiṭṭigeya naḍisi saudhavanikkuva kelasakke vrittiyāgi Ā dēvara keya Oḻage sāvaḷige
keyiṁ teṁka kēsa vadēvara keya paḍuvalu virana keyiṁ baḍagalu yaṟumā ḻana mane bācaOḍeyara kōlalu sarvvamānya sarvvabādhe pariThere is space for about five letters between kē and sa.
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mūḍi koṭa mattaru haṁneraḍu 12 mane kēsavadēvara biṭṭa yaṁ baḍagalu haneraḍu kai 12
dīpadi baṟigelasa sodhayanakehasarvvaru gurudēvara du solagaṇadēra sakalāṁtavu sākṣi sōmanāthadēvaru
Digital edition of SII 20.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
